frames.name: Energy Crisis Frame
frames.description: Focuses on the immediate impact on oil and gas prices, supply disruptions, and the closure of the Strait of Hormuz
frames.emphasis: Supply chain disruptions, price volatility, and the strategic importance of the Strait of Hormuz

frames.name: Economic Contagion Frame
frames.description: Emphasizes broader market impacts including stock market declines, inflation concerns, and global economic ripple effects
frames.emphasis: Market volatility, inflation fears, interest rate implications, and global economic stability

frames.name: Consumer Impact Frame
frames.description: Focuses on direct effects on American consumers, particularly rising gas prices and practical advice
frames.emphasis: Immediate consumer costs, gas price increases, and practical consumer guidance

frames.name: Geopolitical Escalation Frame
frames.description: Presents the story as an expanding regional conflict with uncertain duration and scope
frames.emphasis: Military escalation, regional spread of conflict, and uncertainty about conflict duration

frames.name: Infrastructure Vulnerability Frame
frames.description: Highlights attacks on specific energy infrastructure and facilities across the Gulf region
frames.emphasis: Physical damage to oil refineries, gas processing facilities, and energy infrastructure

outlierPerspectives: China's diplomatic pressure on Iran to keep the Strait of Hormuz open (DW only)
Specific insurance industry response with named companies canceling war risk coverage (DW only)
Iraq shutting down oil production due to shipping bottlenecks (ABC News only)
Travel disruptions and stranded passengers in Dubai (NBC News only)
missingContext: Historical precedent for similar energy crises and their duration
Alternative shipping routes and their capacity to handle diverted oil traffic
Strategic petroleum reserve levels and release policies
Detailed breakdown of which countries are most vulnerable to supply disruptions
Timeline and background of events leading to the current escalation
Analysis of Iran's actual military capabilities versus threats
Role of other major oil producers in potentially offsetting supply losses
